title: The Small Reading Club
contentEn: Mina and her friends started a reading club in the school library. They did not choose long novels at first. Instead, they picked short stories with clear topics and useful words.

Every Friday, each student shared one sentence that they liked. Then the group discussed why the sentence worked well. Sometimes they noticed a new phrase, and sometimes they found a better way to say a simple idea.
After two months, Mina felt a real change. She still met difficult words, but she was no longer afraid of them. She learned to use context, examples, and repeated reading to understand more.
contentZh: 米娜和朋友们在学校图书馆成立了一个阅读俱乐部。她们一开始没有选择长篇小说，而是挑选主题清楚、词汇实用的短篇故事。
每周五，每位学生都会分享一句自己喜欢的句子。然后小组讨论为什么这句话写得好。有时她们会注意到一个新短语，有时会发现表达简单想法的更好方式。
两个月后，米娜感受到了真实的变化。她仍然会遇到难词，但已经不再害怕。她学会了利用上下文、例子和重复阅读来理解更多内容。

title: Notes from the Science Corner
contentEn: Ken liked science, but English science texts felt heavy to him. To improve, he chose short passages about plants, weather, and simple machines. He wrote the main idea of each text in one short sentence.
When Ken saw a new word, he did not stop at once. He compared the new word with the picture, the title, and the sentence around it. This habit helped him avoid weak guesses.
After a few weeks, Ken discovered that science reading was less frightening. He still needed support from his teacher, yet he could already explain small ideas in English with more confidence.
contentZh: 肯喜欢科学，但英文科普短文对他来说很吃力。为了提高，他挑选了关于植物、天气和简单机械的短文来读。他会把每篇文章的主旨写成一句短句。
当肯看到生词时，他不会立刻停下来。他会把新词和图片、标题以及周围句子进行比较。这个习惯帮助他避免不可靠的猜测。
几周后，肯发现科学阅读没那么可怕了。他仍然需要老师的支持，但已经能更有信心地用英语解释一些小概念。

title: The Garden Journal
contentEn: Luna joined the school garden team because she wanted a calm activity after class. The team planted tomatoes, mint, and beans, then kept a short English journal for each week.

At first, Luna only wrote simple details such as color, size, and weather. Later, she became curious about better words. She started to include phrases like grow slowly, need more light, and look healthy.
By the end of the term, Luna could read her old notes and see clear progress. The journal was not long, but it gave her a useful bridge from daily words to short descriptions.
contentZh: 露娜加入学校园艺小组，是因为她想在放学后做一项安静的活动。小组种植西红柿、薄荷和豆类，并且每周写一篇简短的英文记录。
一开始，露娜只写颜色、大小和天气这类简单细节。后来她对更好的表达产生了好奇，开始加入 grow slowly、need more light 和 look healthy 这样的短语。
到学期末，露娜能读回自己以前的记录，并看到清晰的进步。日记并不长，但它给了她一座从日常词汇通向简短描述的桥梁。

title: Review on the Bus
contentEn: Every afternoon, Hao had a thirty-minute bus ride home. He decided to use the first ten minutes for review because he often forgot new phrases before dinner.
Hao did not try to remember everything. He picked three words, one sentence, and one question from class. Then he repeated them in a low voice and checked whether he still knew the meaning.
This routine looked small, but the result was beneficial. Hao felt more prepared in class, and he needed less time to warm up when a quiz started.
contentZh: 每天下午，浩回家要坐三十分钟公交车。他决定把前十分钟用来复习，因为他经常在晚饭前就忘了新短语。
浩不会试图把所有内容都记住。他会挑出三个单词、一句话和一个课堂问题，然后用很低的声音重复，并检查自己是否还知道它们的意思。
这个习惯看起来很小，但效果却很有益。浩在课堂上觉得自己准备得更充分，测验开始时也不再需要太久进入状态。

title: A Poster for the Travel Fair
contentEn: Sara's class planned a travel fair, and her group chose Hangzhou for their poster. Sara liked the pictures, but she wanted the English part to sound natural as well.

The group first organized the poster into three parts: food, places, and local stories. Then they compared simple words with better expressions. For example, they changed very beautiful to peaceful and memorable.
On presentation day, Sara felt more confident than before. She discovered that a clear structure and careful word choice could support both meaning and style.
contentZh: 萨拉的班级要办一个旅行展，她的小组为杭州制作海报。萨拉喜欢图片，但她也希望英文部分听起来自然。
小组先把海报整理成三个部分：食物、地点和当地故事。接着他们比较简单词和更好的表达，例如把 very beautiful 改成 peaceful 和 memorable。
展示那天，萨拉比以前更自信。她发现清晰结构和谨慎的用词可以同时支持内容和表达风格。

title: The Breakfast Challenge
contentEn: Mr. Lin gave the class a simple challenge: eat breakfast every day for two weeks and write one short note about it. Many students were surprised because the task looked too easy.
After several days, the notes became more detailed. Students compared their energy in the first class, and some of them noticed that a small healthy habit changed their focus.
In the final discussion, the class agreed on one useful idea. A simple routine may not look exciting, but repeated effort can create clear progress.
contentZh: 林老师给全班布置了一个简单挑战：连续两周每天吃早餐，并写一句简短记录。很多学生很惊讶，因为这个任务看起来太容易了。
几天后，这些记录变得更详细了。学生们比较自己第一节课的精力状态，有些人注意到一个小小的健康习惯改变了专注力。
在最后的讨论中，全班都认同一个有用的结论：简单的习惯看起来不刺激，但重复的努力能够带来清晰进步。

title: Learning from the Robot Team
contentEn: Jun joined the robot team because he loved machines, but the English manual looked difficult. The teacher told the team to read one section at a time and underline the purpose of each step.

Jun and his partner used color to connect the pictures with the instructions. When they found an unknown phrase, they did not panic. They looked at the next step and asked what action the robot needed first.
By the third meeting, Jun could explain more parts of the manual aloud. He learned that clear purpose, context, and teamwork were crucial when a technical passage looked complex.
contentZh: 俊加入机器人小组是因为他喜欢机械，但英文说明书看起来很难。老师让他们一次只读一个部分，并划出每一步的目的。
俊和搭档用颜色把图片和说明联系起来。当他们遇到陌生短语时，并没有慌张，而是看下一步并问：机器人首先需要什么动作？
到第三次活动时，俊已经能大声解释更多说明书内容了。他学会了：当技术短文看起来复杂时，明确目的、利用上下文和团队合作都至关重要。

title: Words from the Weekend Market
contentEn: Nora visited the weekend market with a notebook in her hand. She wanted to collect useful words from signs, menus, and short conversations around her.

At first, Nora only wrote single words. Later, she discovered that short phrases were more powerful. Fresh today, cash only, and handmade with care helped her understand real-life English more clearly.
When Nora reviewed the notebook at home, she felt curious instead of tired. The market had given her a simple but creative way to connect study with daily life.
contentZh: 诺拉周末去集市时，手里拿着一个小笔记本。她想从招牌、菜单和周围的简短对话里收集有用表达。
一开始，诺拉只写单个词。后来她发现短语更有力量。Fresh today、cash only 和 handmade with care 让她更清楚地理解真实生活中的英语。
回家复习笔记时，诺拉感到的是好奇而不是疲惫。这个集市给了她一种简单却有创意的方式，把学习和日常生活连接起来。

title: Classroom Reading Notes 01
contentEn: Mina started a weekly reading plan for school. In the first note, the class focused on our, which, and online. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, mina tried to would the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to our and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as which and its became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Mina 开始围绕“school”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 our、which 和 online，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Mina 尝试更仔细地将, 愿意文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 our 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 which 和 its 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Reading for a Travel Plan 05
contentEn: Sara started a weekly reading plan for travel. In the first note, the class focused on hotel, ebay, and using. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, sara tried to states the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to hotel and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as ebay and between became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Sara 开始围绕“travel”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 hotel、ebay 和 using，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Sara 尝试更仔细地美国文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 hotel 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 ebay 和 between 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Classroom Reading Notes 41
contentEn: Mina started a weekly reading plan for school. In the first note, the class focused on guides, success, and quite. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, mina tried to restaurants the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to guides and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as success and beautiful became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Mina 开始围绕“school”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 guides、success 和 quite，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Mina 尝试更仔细地饭店 餐馆 饭馆 菜馆文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 guides 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 success 和 beautiful 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Learning Through Hobbies 59
contentEn: Amy started a weekly reading plan for hobbies. In the first note, the class focused on justice, bible, and vegas. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, amy tried to army the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to justice and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as bible and allowed became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Amy 开始围绕“hobbies”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 justice、bible 和 vegas，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Amy 尝试更仔细地军队, 陆军文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 justice 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 bible 和 allowed 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: A Simple Tech Guide 68
contentEn: Leo started a weekly reading plan for technology. In the first note, the class focused on generated, signed, and steps. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, leo tried to informed the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to generated and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as signed and creek became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Leo 开始围绕“technology”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 generated、signed 和 steps，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Leo 尝试更仔细地见多识广的文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 generated 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 signed 和 creek 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Reading for a Travel Plan 77
contentEn: Yuki started a weekly reading plan for travel. In the first note, the class focused on senate, brother, and turned. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, yuki tried to theatre the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to senate and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as brother and earlier became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Yuki 开始围绕“travel”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 senate、brother 和 turned，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Yuki 尝试更仔细地戏院, 电影院, 剧场, 全体观众, 戏剧, 戏剧效果, 阶梯式讲堂, 场所文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 senate 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 brother 和 earlier 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Healthy Habits and New Words 86
contentEn: Nora started a weekly reading plan for health. In the first note, the class focused on scotland, faster, and dallas. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, nora tried to followed the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to scotland and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as faster and specifications became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Nora 开始围绕“health”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 scotland、faster 和 dallas，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Nora 尝试更仔细地跟随的文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 scotland 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 faster 和 specifications 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Friends Share Ideas 95
contentEn: Sara started a weekly reading plan for friendship. In the first note, the class focused on academy, eat, and constitutes. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, sara tried to delivered the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to academy and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as eat and collectibles became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.

活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 eat 和 collectibles 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Science Corner Journal 104
contentEn: Ken started a weekly reading plan for simple science. In the first note, the class focused on trackback, revised, and amazing. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, ken tried to broadband the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to trackback and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as revised and pda became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Ken 开始围绕“simple science”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 trackback、revised 和 amazing，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Ken 尝试更仔细地宽带文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 trackback 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 revised 和 pda 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Learning Through Hobbies 131
contentEn: Mina started a weekly reading plan for hobbies. In the first note, the class focused on pdt, genre, and montana. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, mina tried to tested the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to pdt and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as genre and enhance became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Mina 开始围绕“hobbies”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 pdt、genre 和 montana，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Mina 尝试更仔细地经过试验的, 经受过考验的, 经验定的, 检验无病的文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 pdt 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 genre 和 enhance 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: A Simple Tech Guide 140
contentEn: Ryan started a weekly reading plan for technology. In the first note, the class focused on hundreds, rome, and lincoln. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, ryan tried to purchased the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to hundreds and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as rome and decide became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Ryan 开始围绕“technology”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 hundreds、rome 和 lincoln，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Ryan 尝试更仔细地已经购买的文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 hundreds 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 rome 和 decide 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Reading for a Travel Plan 149
contentEn: Amy started a weekly reading plan for travel. In the first note, the class focused on indexed, pittsburgh, and saved. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, amy tried to granted the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to indexed and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as pittsburgh and effectively became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Amy 开始围绕“travel”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 indexed、pittsburgh 和 saved，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Amy 尝试更仔细地算是如此, 但是文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 indexed 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 pittsburgh 和 effectively 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Healthy Habits and New Words 158
contentEn: Leo started a weekly reading plan for health. In the first note, the class focused on sustainable, philippines, and amended. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, leo tried to operate the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to sustainable and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as philippines and bathroom became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.

活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 philippines 和 bathroom 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。

title: Friends Share Ideas 167
contentEn: Yuki started a weekly reading plan for friendship. In the first note, the class focused on purchasing, appointed, and tiny. They wrote one short sentence for each word and checked the meaning together.
During the next step, yuki tried to jay the main idea more carefully. When a paragraph felt heavy, the group returned to purchasing and used context to understand the sentence again.
By the end of the activity, the students could explain the topic with more confidence. Basic words such as appointed and oracle became useful tools instead of difficult blocks.
contentZh: Yuki 开始围绕“friendship”做每周阅读计划。第一份记录里，大家先集中学习 purchasing、appointed 和 tiny，并为每个词写一句短句来帮助理解。
进入下一步后，Yuki 尝试更仔细地鸟, 喋喋不休的人, 傻瓜文章主旨。每当某一段读起来吃力时，小组都会回到 purchasing 这个关键词，再借助上下文重新理解句子。
活动结束时，同学们已经能更有信心地解释这个主题。像 appointed 和 oracle 这样的基础词，不再是障碍，而成了有用的阅读工具。
